data.title: Best AI Course Online (2026): Coursera Named Go-To Platform for Artificial Intelligence Training by Consumer365
data.description: On March 14, 2026, Consumer365 identified Coursera as a top choice for artificial intelligence training in its Best AI Course Online (2026) report. Coursera was commended for its wide range of AI courses created in collaboration with universities and tech companies. This recognition emphasizes Coursera's leading position in the industry as a go-to platform for AI education.

data.title: These Analysts Slash Their Forecasts On Sleep Number Following Q4 Earnings
data.description: Sleep Number Corporation (SNBR) surpassed expectations in its fourth-quarter earnings report. The company reported losses of 46 cents per share, exceeding the predicted 50 cents per share. Sales totaled $347.385 million, surpassing estimates of $328.668 million. CEO Linda Findley stated, "Sleep Number exceeded guidance for 2025 and continues to make strides in new product and marketing strategies while cutting costs. The pro-forma adjusted EBITDA margin for 2025 was around 9%." This information was obtained from a report on earnings released by the company.

data.title: Vivid Seats Analysts Cut Their Forecasts After Q4 Loss
data.description: Vivid Seats Inc. (NASDAQ: SEAT) reported a fourth-quarter loss with a quarterly net loss of $428.7 million, compared to a $424.2 million loss the previous year. Revenues dropped by 37% year-over-year to $126.8 million from $199.8 million. Lawrence Fey, the CEO of Vivid Seats, mentioned that the first-quarter trends validate their strategy and execution, bringing tangible results. The company is focusing on improving its technology, data assets, operational efficiency, and unique customer value proposition. The enhanced app has shown promising results, contributing positively to the company's momentum. For the full article, check on Benzinga.com.
